channel.title: Director on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Director on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: About
item.description: 📨 Contact Me 📃 My Resume 🎗️ Communities I Support 🛟 My Life Mantras 🗣️ What others says about me 🐦‍🔥️ My Inventions 📚️ My Books 🏆️ My Awards 👉 Few words about Kuldeep! Kuldeep has built his career empowering businesses with the Tech@Core approach. He has incubated IoT and AR/VR Centres of Excellence with a strong focus on building development practices such as CICD, TDD, automation testing and XP around new technologies.
